channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Women's tennis players now are eligible for paid maternity leave funded by Saudi Arabia's PIF
item.description: Pregnant players on the women's tennis tour now can receive 12 months of paid maternity leave, and those who become parents via partner pregnancy, surrogacy or adoption can get two months off with pay, under a program sponsored by the Public Investment Fund of Saudi Arabia and announced Thursday by
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Katie Taylor and Amanda Serrano bring trilogy women's boxing bout to MSG, site of the original
item.description: Katie Taylor and Amanda Serrano will fight for a third time, returning to Madison Square Garden after staging the first women’s boxing match to headline the arena in the opener of their trilogy.
item.dc:creator: Brian Mahoney, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: One-of-a-kind card featuring jersey patch of Pirates star Paul Skenes is heading to auction
item.description: PITTBURGH (AP) — Paul Skenes has been in the major leagues for less than a year. A piece of the Pittsburgh Pirates ace — well, OK, a piece of the jersey that Skenes donned during his first start last May — could be ready to join some elite company.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Michigan basketball’s bid for Big Ten title derailed by another lackluster home performance
item.description: The No. 17-ranked Michigan Wolverines men’s basketball team must be studied by archaeologists, as their poor play down the stretch of the season with the chance to secure a Big Ten Conference championship is head-scratching.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Carr, Local 4

item.title: Harden has 24th 50-point game, 1 shy of Kobe Bryant for 3rd all-time, as Obama watches
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — James Harden delivered another 50-point game Wednesday night, putting on a throwback performance in the Clippers' new arena.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Bucks' Giannis Antetokounmpo says consistency of his work ethic helped him join 20,000-point club
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Milwaukee Bucks star Giannis Antetokounmpo believes his latest milestone should serve as a testament to his consistent work ethic.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Antetokounmpo joins 20,000-point club as Bucks roll past short-handed Mavericks 137-107
item.description: Giannis Antetokounmpo scored 32 points to bring his career total over 20,000, Damian Lillard added 34 points and Kevin Porter Jr. had a triple-double as the surging Milwaukee Bucks trounced the short-handed Dallas Mavericks 137-107 The 30-year-old Antetokounmpo has scored 20,010 career points.
item.dc:creator: Steve Megargee, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Rookie No. 1 pick Macklin Celebrini stays upbeat in finding positives amidst Sharks' losing season
item.description: BUFFALO, N.Y. (AP) — Rookie center Macklin Celebrini has been steadfast in staying upbeat amidst a losing season in which the young, rebuilding San Jose Sharks are in jeopardy of finishing last in the NHL standings for a second consecutive year.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bulls Fest 2025: Team announces dates, registration open for 3v3 tournament
item.description: CHICAGO — Registration is now open for Bulls Fest 2025, which will be held outdoors on the United Center campus from Aug. 23-24, the team announced this week.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: LeBron James becomes first to score 50,000 combined points in NBA regular season and playoffs
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James is well on his way to rewriting every previous definition of basketball longevity, and the 40-year-old star is now racking up numbers the NBA has never seen before.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Donovan Mitchell scores 28 and NBA-best Cavs beat Bulls 139-117 for 11th straight win
item.description: Donovan Mitchell scored 28 points, Jarrett Allen added 25 points and 17 rebounds, and the NBA-best Cleveland Cavaliers won their 11th straight game, 139-117 over the Chicago Bulls on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Celtics honor Somerset teen who saved choking girl
item.description: Ben Courville, a junior firefighter with the Dighton Fire Department, saved a girl last summer from choking at a Fall River restaurant.
item.dc:creator: Melanie DaSilva, NewsNation

item.title: First female NBA scout talks trailblazing for Women's History Month
item.description: Laflin was previuosly a cheerleader for three professional sports teams, had a recurring role in "Baywatch" and worked as a model.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Offensive line
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS, Ind. (WGN) — It's the final day of workouts at the NFL Scouting Combine, and Sunday's position group is the one with the most buzz around them when it comes to the Chicago Bears—offensive line.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: New Jersey cools off Utah HC, 3-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The New Jersey Devils scored twice in the third period to defeat the Utah Hockey Club 3-1 at Delta Center on Saturday, ending Utah's three-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: USU gets smacked by Colorado State, 93-66
item.description: FORT COLLINS, Colo. (ABC4 Sports) - This is not the way the Utah State basketball team was hoping to go into the postseason. The Aggies suffered its worst loss of the season, losing by 27 points to Colorado State Saturday afternoon, 93-66.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lee Kunzman, 'persistent' Indy 500 veteran, dies at 80
item.description: Kunzman's best finish in his INDYCAR SERIES career was in 1979, when he placed second at Atlanta Motor Speedway. It was just a narrow loss to winner Johnny Rutherford, IMS officials said.
item.dc:creator: Cooper Hudson, WGN 9

item.title: Coby White scores 24 points and Chicago Bulls top Raptors in overtime, 125-115
item.description: Coby White scored 24 points, including a clutch four-point play, and the Bulls rallied to beat the Toronto Raptors 125-115 in overtime on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
